---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to BlankVisuals© Validator (FW-001)
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this address?**
A clear description of the gap or limitation you've encountered.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see added or changed — new rule, new framework type, new checklist, documentation improvement, or other.

**Rule or area affected**
Which part of the framework this touches:
- [ ] Rule catalog (`reference.md`)
- [ ] Framework taxonomy (new agent type)
- [ ] Validation layer (L0–L4)
- [ ] `verify.sh` structure checks
- [ ] Documentation (`USAGE.md`, `README.md`)
- [ ] Other

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

**Additional context**
Examples, real-world scenarios, or evidence that motivates this request.
